name: Fall detection (pose heuristic)
description: MediaPipe pose + a simple 'shoulder-to-ankle vector is horizontal' heuristic. Fires an emergency-priority Pushover alert and records a 60s clip on suspected falls.
use_case: Elder-care or warehouse safety camera. The heuristic is intentionally simple; tune by editing the threshold in `detector.pose`. Pair with a `vision_llm` for human-readable context if you want to reduce false positives.
